scripts.dev: bash ../../scripts/run-with-env.sh env TSX_TSCONFIG_PATH=tsconfig.dev.json pnpm exec tsx watch cmd/main.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @repo/types build && pnpm --filter @repo/utils build && pnpm --filter @repo/content build && pnpm --filter @repo/github build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @repo/types build && pnpm --filter @repo/utils build && pnpm --filter @repo/content build && pnpm --filter @repo/github build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
